changeSet.author: memo
changeSet.comment: Backfill card_journey_events.rating_submitted for review_logs that lack a link (Short-FSRS path bug fix). Idempotent: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO card_journey_events ( user_id, card_id, deck_id, session_id, event_type, event_time, actor, source, idempotency_key, review_log_id, causation_id, policy_version, payload_json ) SELECT rl.user_id, rl.card_id, c.deck_id, rl.session_id, 'rating_submitted', COALESCE(rl.revealed_at, rl.shown_at, rl.review_time)::bigint, 'user', 'review_service', 'backfill:review_log:' || rl.id::text, rl.id, NULL, 'legacy', jsonb_build_object( 'rating', rl.rating, 'reviewIntervalDays', COALESCE(rl.scheduled_days::double precision, 0), 'policyVersion', 'legacy' ) FROM review_logs rl JOIN cards c ON c.id = rl.card_id AND c.user_id = rl.user_id LEFT JOIN card_journey_events cje ON cje.user_id = rl.user_id AND cje.review_log_id = rl.id AND cje.event_type = 'rating_submitted' WHERE cje.id IS NULL ON CONFLICT (user_id, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING;
